description: This Java source file defines Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) for supporting document APIs in a Spring Boot application. It includes records for upload responses, list items, and metadata update requests, with Swagger annotations for API documentation and validation annotations.

classes.name: DocumentDtos
classes.description: A final class serving as a container for DTO record definitions related to document APIs.

methods.name: UploadResponse
methods.description: A record representing the response returned after a document is uploaded, containing document metadata and timestamps.

methods.name: ListItem
methods.description: A record representing a summarized item in a list of documents, including identifiers and metadata.

methods.name: MetadataUpdateRequest
methods.description: A record representing a request to update the metadata of a document, requiring a JSON string.
